     the Fermi energy is    -0.7902 ev

!    total energy              =  -14765.57034037 Ry
     estimated scf accuracy    <       0.00000003 Ry
     smearing contrib. (-TS)   =      -0.19803549 Ry
     internal energy E=F+TS    =  -14765.37230488 Ry

     The total energy is F=E-TS. E is the sum of the following terms:
     one-electron contribution = -319685.90315947 Ry
     hartree contribution      =  161298.46568054 Ry
     xc contribution           =   -6092.53283653 Ry
     ewald contribution        =  149717.44133524 Ry
